brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: High-energy, tough-love fitness motivation focusing on gear that matches your training intensity—highlighting the 100% squat-proof seamless fit of Arrowow Active's Sage Green Leggings during real gym workouts.
strategy.cta: Upgrade your training gear at Arrowow Active today.
strategy.hook: Stop scrolling and start squatting! Your excuses won't build that strength, but these 100% squat-proof Sage Green Leggings will at least keep you confident while you put in the work.

script.script_text: Alright team... Stop scrolling and start SQUATTING! ... Your EXCUSES won't build that strength... but these 100% SQUAT-PROOF Sage Green Leggings... will at least keep you CONFIDENT... while you put in the WORK! ... Quick reality check:... if your gear doesn't match your training INTENSITY... you're doing it wrong! ... This seamless fit feels like absolutely NOTHING... while giving you ultimate support in your deepest sets... no rolls, no slipping... just pure FOCUS... Let's get after it today... UPGRADE your training gear at Arrowow Active today!

text_critic_report.feedback: The script matches the Sienna Bondi persona perfectly, successfully incorporating her signature catchphrases ('Alright team', 'Quick reality check', 'Let's get after it today') and maintaining her high-energy, authentic, and motivational ('hype girl/tough-love') tone. It strictly avoids all prohibited phrases ('Hello everyone', 'Welcome back to my channel', 'Buy this product now', 'Link in bio').

scenes.action: An energetic fitness influencer transitions from holding a phone screen directly into a deep squat position on a gym floor, pointing dynamically at the camera.
scenes.camera: Medium shot, starting at eye-level and rapidly tilting down to follow the influencer descending into a squat.

scenes.action: The influencer performs a slow, controlled squat showing the sage green leggings stretching but remaining completely opaque and premium; she smiles confidently at the camera.
scenes.camera: Low-angle close-up tracking the back and side profile of the leggings during the deepest portion of the squat.

scenes.action: The influencer walks determinedly over to a heavy barbell rack, with a focused facial expression, grabbing the barbell and preparing to squat.
scenes.camera: Over-the-shoulder medium-wide shot, tracking her walk with a subtle camera pan to convey high energy and intensity.

scenes.action: The influencer performs a deep barbell squat, showing the seamless waistband staying perfectly flat in place without any rolling, slipping, or pinching.
scenes.camera: Macro close-up shot focusing on the waistband and seamless fabric as her muscles contract, moving dynamically with her movement.

scenes.action: The influencer successfully racks the barbell, turns directly to face the camera with a triumphant smile, and does a friendly wave/gesture.
scenes.camera: Eye-level medium shot with a shallow depth of field, slowly zooming in to a close-up on her face as she delivers the final call to action.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt: A high-fidelity cinematic style visual reference showcasing a premium activewear brand campaign. The scene is set in a brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights in the soft-focus background, creating a clean premium fitness aesthetic (Gymshark/Lululemon style). A female fitness influencer with an athletic build is featured in a matching, seamless activewear set in a beautiful pastel sage green color. The fabric is high-quality, completely opaque, and robustly squat-proof. The prompt captures the essence of her dynamic workout sequence. Frame 1: An eye-level medium shot of her transitioning into a deep squat on the gym floor, pointing dynamically at the camera with an energetic smile. Frame 2: A low-angle close-up tracking the side and back profile of her sage green leggings at the deepest point of her squat, showing the fabric stretching perfectly while remaining opaque. Frame 3: An over-the-shoulder wide-angle shot of her walking determinedly toward a heavy barbell rack, grabbing the barbell. Frame 4: A macro close-up focusing on the seamless waistband, showing it staying perfectly flat without rolling, slipping, or pinching as her waist muscles contract. Frame 5: A shallow depth of field medium shot showing her successfully racking the barbell and turning directly to the camera with a triumphant smile and a friendly wave. The entire composition has professional commercial lighting, sharp focus on the influencer, and a premium aesthetic.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video fails to meet production standards primarily due to severe lip-sync issues. During the direct-to-camera shots, the subject's lip movements are completely disconnected from the audio track. This failure makes the attempt at a voiceover strategy ineffective and jarring. Additionally, the subject's face exhibits a noticeable 'uncanny valley' effect, appearing unnatural and artificial. The overall quality is further diminished by the repetitive looping of the same short sequence of actions throughout the video.
